source.scope: product-scoped to Mahima's 660 owned product IDs; an order counts ONLY if its first session has "mahi" (Mahima) or "jeff" (Jeffri) — no other/unattributed bucket. Crossover cases (first session mahi, second session jeff) still count as Mahima per the first-session-only rule, but are flagged separately for visibility (10 such orders this month)
